task.title: Implement stack-aware Node and Python template profiles.

context.problem_statement: Placeholder Node and Python stack profiles should become useful opt-in defaults for common target repos without installing dependencies or taking over application scaffolding.
background: AGW-058 is repo-contract-kit install-layer work, not agent-workflow-kit prompt-source work.
Current Codex_CodeReview backlog status is 3 open, 98 done, 0 partial; AGW-058 is the next open item.
Current Codex_CodeReview and repo-contract-kit checkouts are clean before this packet is written.
The previous AGW-055 source task is committed in Codex_CodeReview as 6d21797, and AGW-053/kit source work is committed in repo-contract-kit through be27b2f.
non_goals: Do not install npm, pnpm, yarn, pip, uv, poetry, tox, pytest, or any project dependencies.
Do not create application source trees, package lockfiles, virtual environments, or language-specific CI that assumes a particular framework.
Do not make Node or Python profiles part of every install unless the existing preset explicitly selects them.
Do not change canonical workflow prompts in Codex_CodeReview except for dogfood closeout after the kit update.

finalizer_receipt_paths: repo-contract-kit commit be27b2f is the current source baseline
previous_task_state.notes: AGW-058 may start after this packet commit; no active sibling tasks or dirty source files were reported before packet creation.

closeout_required_before_start.reason: The prior task is committed, both involved checkouts are clean, and task-status reports no active tasks or coordination warnings.
closeout_required_before_start.required_next_step: Commit this AGW-058 packet, then implement only the scoped repo-contract-kit profile/template/docs/tests work.

goal_alignment.repo_goal: repo-contract-kit installs safe docs-as-code and agent workflow scaffolding into target repos while preserving target-owned work.

area_contracts.purpose: Opt-in Node-oriented managed profile files for target repos.
area_contracts.notes: The profile should provide useful repo hygiene defaults and documentation without framework lock-in.

area_contracts.purpose: Opt-in Python-oriented managed profile files for target repos.
area_contracts.notes: The profile should provide useful repo hygiene defaults and documentation without dependency installation.

area_contracts.purpose: Install/update profile selection, manifest registration, and regression coverage.
area_contracts.notes: Only change installer behavior if existing profile mechanics cannot express useful stack profiles.

area_contracts.purpose: Operator-facing setup, profile, and update guidance.
area_contracts.notes: Profile behavior is user-visible and needs documentation.

stop_conditions: Stop if useful stack profiles require package installation, framework detection, or generated application code.
Stop if the existing profile system cannot support opt-in Node/Python profiles without changing unrelated presets.
Stop if target-owned files would be overwritten rather than preserved through the managed manifest/update flow.

protected_files: Runtime credentials, global package manager state, virtual environments, node_modules, lockfiles, and package manager caches.
Application source files in dummy or target repos outside managed profile templates.
Codex_CodeReview canonical workflow prompt sources unless a separate agent-workflow-kit task is selected.
Existing target-owned files in migrated repos except through reviewed proposal artifacts.
expected_outputs: Node profile templates with useful docs/config defaults and profile metadata.
Python profile templates with useful docs/config defaults and profile metadata.
Install/update tests proving each profile is opt-in, managed, and manifest-visible.
Operator docs explaining how to select the profiles and what they intentionally do not do.
Version/changelog updates in repo-contract-kit, followed by dogfood update and backlog closeout in Codex_CodeReview.

phase_files.reason: The work is cross-repo but small enough to execute in one bounded implementation phase after this packet commit.

phases.title: Stack Profile Implementation
phases.objective: Implement and validate opt-in Node and Python repo-contract-kit profile templates, then dogfood and close AGW-058.
allowed_scope: repo-contract-kit profile templates, installer/update tests, docs, version files
Codex_CodeReview dogfood install files and backlog closeout files
completion_evidence: Codex_CodeReview kit-status and backlog checks pass
AGW-058 is marked done in source and mirror backlog files
phases.handoff_notes: If the work expands into package-manager detection or framework-specific scaffolding, stop and split a separate task.

acceptance_criteria.description: Node and Python profiles install useful stack-aware defaults instead of placeholders.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Install each profile into a dummy repo and inspect the resulting managed files and manifest entries.

acceptance_criteria.description: Profiles remain opt-in and do not install dependencies, generate lockfiles, or assume a framework.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review template contents and install tests; confirm no package-manager commands are executed.

acceptance_criteria.description: Update safety is preserved for managed files and target-owned customizations.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Tests cover managed manifest registration and profile update behavior, or explicitly document unchanged existing coverage.

acceptance_criteria.description: Operator docs describe profile selection and boundaries.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Review README/docs/template docs for Node/Python profile guidance and non-goals.

acceptance_criteria.description: Dogfood install in Codex_CodeReview reflects the new kit version and source ref after repo-contract-kit validation.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Run make kit-status KIT=/Volumes/Myrtle/Code/04_Code/repo-contract-kit in Codex_CodeReview after update.

commands.expected_result: focused profile install/update coverage passes in repo-contract-kit
repo-contract-kit VERSION and CHANGELOG are valid
Codex_CodeReview dogfood install updates safely from the local kit checkout

commands.command: make backlog-check && make backlog-split-check && make backlog-status && make agent-next
commands.expected_result: Codex_CodeReview backlog mirrors remain valid and AGW-058 closeout advances the next item
Codex_CodeReview reports the dogfooded kit version/source ref

commands.command: make docs-check && make version-check && git diff --check

evidence_to_capture: Profile template file list before and after implementation
Dummy install evidence for node and python profiles
Backlog closeout status and next open item

readiness_check.command: make agent-task-ready TASK=AGW-058 TASK_READY_JSON=1 or record why unavailable
readiness_check.expected_result: readiness passes or a blocker is recorded before handoff

lifecycle_action.command: make agent-task-finalize TASK=AGW-058 TASK_RECEIPT=.agent-workflows/tasks/AGW-058/receipt.json TASK_FINALIZE_JSON=1 or durable fallback receipt
lifecycle_action.expected_result: task metadata is terminal and final receipt is linked, or fallback receipt is documented

final_task_status.expected_result: terminal task state, receipt path, and active overlaps are visible or unavailable state is explained

closeout_preview.expected_result: closeout preview reports expected changes; applying closeout requires explicit approval

closeout_requirements.dirty_state_explanation: Final handoff must classify any remaining dirty files in both repo-contract-kit and Codex_CodeReview.

docs_impact.notes: Profile behavior is user-visible install behavior and must be documented.

known_risks: Stack profiles could overreach into framework scaffolding or dependency management.
New profile files could be added without managed manifest coverage.
Docs could imply package-manager behavior that the kit deliberately does not perform.
Dogfood update could preserve local managed-file conflicts that need review rather than force-overwrite.
stop_conditions: Stop if profile implementation requires network access or package installation.
Stop if tests reveal existing profile update semantics are unsafe for stack profiles.
Stop if Codex_CodeReview dogfood update produces conflicts that cannot be safely classified.

approval.notes: Approved by the user's request to task-packet and implement each open backlog item in series with commits between steps.

token_budget.notes: No explicit token budget for the active goal.

dependencies: Commit this packet before editing repo-contract-kit.
Commit repo-contract-kit implementation before dogfood closeout in Codex_CodeReview.
handoff.next_packet_hint: AGW-059 should remain a separate planning-adapter examples task after AGW-058 is closed.
